# CDI Workforce Readiness

::: {.cdi-message}
Connect the microbiome workflow to remote, physical, and hybrid work readiness.
:::

## Learning goal

By the end of this lesson, the learner should understand how this stage supports the complete Microbiome System.

## Why this matters

This section will explain the role of CDI Workforce Readiness in the end-to-end microbiome workflow.

## Practical workflow



## Takeaway

Microbiome analysis is strongest when each technical step is connected back to the study question, metadata, interpretation, and reproducible reporting.
